statement.en: Gene Selection for Breast Cancer Classification Using T-Test Filtering and Wrapper-Based Optimization

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future date suggesting provisional/staged upload) presenting an empirical ML pipeline combining established statistical methods (t-test filtering) with wrapper-based feature selection for a domain application (breast cancer classification). The core claims are neither proven nor refuted without experimental validation and peer review. The approach combines known techniques in novel combination, placing it in provisional/developmental state rather than established fact or formal theorem.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 信号と雑音の戦い、最適な遺伝子の塔は異なる平均の峡谷を登る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの細胞の集団が頂点で出会い、距離はやがて識別力の道となる。
